channel.title: Veille métier du 2026-06-12
channel.description: Veille quotidienne assurance, finance, banque et régulation.

item.title: ​The EBA launches early consultation on simplified EU-wide stress test, with climate risk integration
item.description: The European Banking Authority (EBA) published today the draft methodology, templates, and template guidance for the 2027 EU-wide stress test. The 2027 exercise introduces significant simplifications to improve efficiency and risk sensitivity, while preserving the robustness and comparability of results. Key changes include a substantial reduction in data requirements, the alignment of information with harmonised supervisory reporting, and the integration of climate risks into the EU-wide stress test. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (european banking authority) ; impact réglementaire.

item.title: EU structural financial indicators: end of 2025
item.description: The European Central Bank (ECB) is the central bank of the European Union countries which have adopted the euro. Our main task is to maintain price stability in the euro area and so preserve the purchasing power of the single currency. — Thématique finance ; source jugée fiable (ecb - press / speeches / interviews) ; information très récente.
